use_cases: Mobile-first bottom navigation with animated sliding indicator for tab switching
Floating pill-shaped navigation bar for quick-access app sections
Dark mode supported navigation for modern app interfaces
Responsive navigation component with smooth Framer Motion transitions
Central floating nav with auto-positioning indicator on resize
ai_summary: A floating bottom navigation bar featuring a smooth animated indicator that slides between active tab items using Framer Motion. The pill-shaped container is fixed at the bottom center of the viewport with shadow and border styling, supporting dark mode and responsive layouts. Includes hover states on navigation items and auto-recalculates indicator position on window resize for accurate positioning across breakpoints.
